problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Perovskite crystal structure optimization may resolve Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
